title: The Lion Within
materials: Natural wood veneer marquetry on birch panel
framed: Unframed — arrives ready to hang or frame
shipping: White-glove fine art courier, worldwide, fully insured in transit
story: A meditation on contained strength. This portrait uses the boldest grain directions and deepest veneer contrasts in the collection — areas where most marquetry softens into approximation, this work insists on precision. The jaw and brow required over three weeks of cutting alone. Power, in this portrait, is not displayed. It is held. The lion within is never the one that roars.
